name: CREATE_AGENT: jenny can you delete a ag

logs.message: [SYSTEM] Task "CREATE_AGENT: jenny can you delete a ag" initialized.

result.reply:
Maine dekha ki aapko `DM_Master_V2` naam ke agent ko delete karna hai.

**🧠 Reasoning:**
Dekho, system mein koi direct `delete_agent` tool ya skill visible nahi hai. Lekin, agent ke lifecycle ko manage karne ke liye, main **`task_manager`** skill ka use karungi, kyunki yeh "Mission lifecycle management" se related hai. Lekin, kyunki agent ko delete karna ek permanent aur high-impact action hai, main **`confirmation_loop`** skill ko bhi use karungi taaki main confirm kar sakun ki aapko sach mein yeh action chahiye.

**🛠️ Proposed Plan:**
1.  I will use the **`task_manager`** skill to attempt to issue a termination command for the specified agent.
2.  I will wrap this action within the **`confirmation_loop`** skill to ensure I get explicit confirmation from you before the system executes the deletion.

**💡 Suggestion:**
Deletion ek irreversible action hai. Kya aap confirm kar sakti hain ki aapko *poora* `DM_Master_V2` agent, uske saare configurations ke saath, permanently remove karna hai?

Confirm karu?
